final_files.tests/test_final.py:
from file_tailer import FileTailer


def test_in_place_truncation_resets_an_offset_past_end(tmp_path):
    source = tmp_path / "active.log"
    checkpoint = tmp_path / "active.cursor"
    source.write_text("a-long-original-line\nsecond-line\n", encoding="utf-8")
    assert FileTailer(source, checkpoint).read_new() == [
        "a-long-original-line",
        "second-line",
    ]

    source.write_text("fresh\n", encoding="utf-8")

    assert FileTailer(source, checkpoint).read_new() == ["fresh"]


def test_reader_continues_normally_after_truncation_recovery(tmp_path):
    source = tmp_path / "active.log"
    checkpoint = tmp_path / "active.cursor"
    source.write_text("0123456789\n", encoding="utf-8")
    FileTailer(source, checkpoint).read_new()
    source.write_text("new\n", encoding="utf-8")
    assert FileTailer(source, checkpoint).read_new() == ["new"]

    with source.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        handle.write("later\n")

    assert FileTailer(source, checkpoint).read_new() == ["later"]
